review.title: Review your responses
review.missingHint: You can submit with missing responses if the scoring threshold is met per scale.

results.title: Assessment results
results.noScales: No scales could be computed with current responses.
results.noHistory: No previous completed attempt to compare yet.

missingPolicy.scale80: Score scale if at least 80% of items are answered; impute remaining items with the scale mean.
missingPolicy.vlq: Each VLQ domain requires both Importance and Consistency; no imputation is used.
